lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.text: Do you want coffee? I'm making a pot.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] Do you want coffee? I'm making a pot.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: Yes please, I've been up since five.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] [enthusiastic] Yes please, I've been up since five.

lines.speaker: Mark
lines.text: The neighbors were having some kind of argument. Through the wall.
lines.taggedText: [long pause] The neighbors were having some kind of argument. [tired] Through the wall.

lines.speaker: Ellen
lines.taggedText: [long pause] [sympathetic] That's rough. Black or milk?
